# Majestic Furniture

> Premium office furniture supplier serving corporate and government organizations across Saudi Arabia and the Gulf (GCC).

## Company Overview

Majestic Furniture is a B2B office furniture company headquartered in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. We source from established international manufacturers and pair that with local market expertise, project consultation, and after-sales support.

We serve ministries, corporate headquarters, financial institutions, healthcare facilities, and regional offices across Saudi Arabia, UAE, Kuwait, Bahrain, Qatar, and Oman.

## Product Categories

- Executive Desks: Executive offices and management suites
- Workstations: Open-plan systems and height-adjustable desks
- Seating: Executive chairs, task chairs, meeting chairs, ergonomic seating
- Conference Systems: Meeting tables, boardroom furniture
- Storage: Pedestals, credenzas, filing cabinets
- Acoustic Solutions: Acoustic panels and privacy pods
- Lounge: Waiting areas, breakout zones, collaboration furniture
- Reception: Front desk and lobby furniture

## Brands We Carry

Interstuhl, Haworth, Kinnarps, Vitra, Herman Miller, Steelcase, Narbutas, Nurus, Forma 5, Sitag, Profim, and more.

## Showrooms

3 showrooms in Riyadh:
- Riyadh Al Olaya
- Riyadh Al Malaz
- Jeddah (coming soon)

Open Sunday through Thursday, 9am to 6pm.

## Key Services

- Full office fit-out (single office to multi-floor)
- Project consultation and space planning
- Supply and professional installation
- After-sales support and warranty service

## Coverage

- Primary market: Saudi Arabia (Riyadh, Jeddah, Dammam, Khobar, Eastern Province)
- Extended coverage: UAE, Kuwait, Bahrain, Qatar, Oman

## Contact

- Email: a.alahmadi@majestic.com.sa
- Website: https://majestic-next.vercel.app
- Languages: English, Arabic
